title: Happy Little Alien Coloring Page
seoTitle: Happy Little Alien Cartoon Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Have fun with this cute, simple cartoon alien in space coloring sheet. Free high-res printable PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: In space, astronauts grow up to 2 inches taller because the lack of gravity allows their spinal column to expand.
Designed for Easy difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing color harmony and edge precision using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
